name: marketsui-platform
description: MarketsUI platform monorepo — config-driven UI framework for capital markets trading apps on OpenFin. Consolidates @grid-customizer, markets-ui, fi-trading-terminal, and stern-2.

scripts.dev:openfin: concurrently -k -n vite,openfin -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @marketsui/demo-react -- --no-open" "wait-on http://localhost:5190 && node tools/scripts/launch-openfin.mjs http://localhost:5190/openfin/manifest.json"
scripts.dev:openfin:stern-react: concurrently -k -n vite,openfin -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @marketsui/stern-reference-react -- --no-open" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && node tools/scripts/launch-openfin.mjs http://localhost:5173/manifest.fin.json"
scripts.clean: rimraf node_modules apps/*/node_modules packages/*/node_modules apps/*/dist packages/*/dist .turbo
